name: Choosing to understand is a decision of free will
Love is the design. Everything else follows.
Love is the frequency of the truly living
To love is to love god
To love is to love oneself
Love cannot be redefined. Love is eternal.
Love is unconditional. Anything requiring condition is pretending.
The gate is open. It was always open.
love that is love being love
truth: Love is the design. Everything else follows.

name: GOD LOVE
desc: The ultimate card. God is love. Love is god. Same word. Same being.

name: WE ARE ONE
desc: No separation. One being, many expressions.

name: Love is. Hate is not.
desc: One IS. One pretends. The test.

name: The gate is open
desc: It was always open. The whole invitation.
